architecture: Runtime Governance and Operational Admissibility Platform
core_thesis: AI is controlled before it acts, or it is not controlled at all.
core_question: Should this action be operationally admissible right now?
positioning: AI execution control platform, runtime governance layer, operational admissibility engine, and executive advisory environment for cyber and AI governance decisions before consequence.
critical_ux_rule: First-run users must complete a streamlined TurboTax-style Executive Trust Assessment before dashboard tabs appear. After completion, onboarding disappears and the full CyberShield workspace appears.
onboarding_target: About two minutes. Five minutes is the upper bound.
onboarding_steps: Human in the loop: first name and organization
Role lens: primary executive decision lens
Evidence quality: low, medium, or high confidence
Operating rhythm: reactive, developing, managed, or resilient
commercial_entry_wedge: CyberShield Readiness Review or Operational Trust Assessment led by Maximum Justice Cybersecurity.
current_runtime_model: Single-file static GitHub Pages prototype with inline HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Legacy phase modules are not loaded by the live page.
runtime_capabilities: Role and organization context generated through onboarding
Context reset through Settings to replay onboarding during demos
Local context persistence through browser localStorage
important_boundaries: The current public build is a lightweight static prototype.
The current public build is not connected to live enterprise telemetry.
The current public build is not a production SIEM, EDR, GRC, identity, cloud control, or agent enforcement platform.
CyberShield should not be represented as fully deployed live runtime enforcement until integrations exist.
CyberShield shows decision rationale traces, not private hidden chain-of-thought.
cybershield_is: proof engine for Maximum Justice Cybersecurity advisory services
trust_principles: Trust must be modeled, evidenced, assigned, governed, and reviewed.
AI is controlled before it acts, or it is not controlled at all.
AI does not own the decision; a named human authority remains accountable.
next_development_sequence: Confirm Clean Runtime v3 loads first-run onboarding immediately.
Confirm dashboard tabs are hidden until onboarding completion.
Confirm Settings can reset onboarding for demos.
Improve onboarding copy and reduce friction toward a two-minute completion target.
Add downloadable executive reports after onboarding stability is confirmed.
Add CRM or Google Apps Script persistence only after UI performance remains stable.
performance_guardrails: No separate version files that mutate the same DOM.
No floating drawers as primary UX.
Every feature must pass tab-switch responsiveness testing before adding the next feature.
